info.title: Stripe Payment Wrapper
info.description: Wraps Stripe for payment session creation and webhook handling. Exposes two HTTP endpoints consumed by orchestrators, and a gRPC endpoint (`payment.PaymentService/CreatePayment` on port 50055) for internal callers. Publishes `payment.completed` and `payment.failed` events to RabbitMQ on webhook receipt.

post.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout session for a consultation and returns the hosted payment URL. The consultation fee amount and currency are read from service environment variables.

Receives raw Stripe webhook events. Validates the `Stripe-Signature` header against `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET`. On `checkout.session.completed`, publishes `payment.completed` to the `clinic.events` exchange. On `payment_intent.payment_failed`, publishes `payment.failed`.

parameters.name: stripe-signature
parameters.description: HMAC signature provided by Stripe for payload verification

schema.description: Raw Stripe event object (passed through directly from Stripe)

400.description: Invalid Stripe signature or malformed payload

appointment_id.description: Consultation/appointment ID stored in Stripe session metadata as `consultation_id`

patient_id.description: BetterAuth nanoid of the patient, stored in Stripe session metadata

payment_link.description: Stripe-hosted Checkout URL — redirect the patient here to complete payment
